page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.3xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 12 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. The instance is equipped with 48.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It operates on the x86_64 architecture and includes advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Deep Learning Boost (VNNI) for accelerated vector and neural network processing. The instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps.

Benchmark results place the ecs.g7.3xlarge in the average performance tier across multiple workloads. In CPU-intensive tasks, it achieves a Geekbench multi-core score of 7907.0 and a Passmark CPU score of 16288.42. Memory performance is characterized by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 629.96 GB/sec, which drops to 81.59 GB/sec for large uncached blocks. For database and key-value store operations, the instance demonstrates strong capability, processing 11.74 million Redis SET operations per second. In language model inference, it handles prompt processing for a small 135M model at 1067.92 tokens per second, though performance drops significantly to 23.62 tokens per second for a medium 7B model.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g7.3xlarge offers a balanced resource profile suitable for general-purpose workloads that do not require specialized GPU acceleration or high-speed local NVMe storage. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without resource contention. This instance is well-suited for applications such as static web serving, software compilation, database operations, and moderate-scale text and image processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.3xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance featuring 12 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it includes 48.0 GB of RAM, offering a balanced 4.0 GB per core, but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. The instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps. Performance benchmarks place this server in the average tier, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 7907.0 and a Passmark CPU score of 16288.42. It demonstrates solid database capabilities, processing 11.74 million Redis SET operations per second, and supports static web serving at 16.97 GB/sec. The ecs.g7.3xlarge is designed for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, software compilation, and database operations, providing a balanced resource-to-cost ratio for non-specialized computing tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 12 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 48 GB RAM, and 8 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for balanced workloads like databases and web serving.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and 48 GB of RAM for reliable enterprise workloads.
